title: antirrhinum majus subsp. molle
intro: Antirrhinum majus subsp. molle, also known as the soft or dwarf snapdragon, is a subspecies of the antirrhinum majus plant, characterized by its compact growth and delicate appearance. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with antirrhinum majus subsp. molle include soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Antirrhinum majus subsp. molle is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
